# Continuo Suspension Exercise provenance

- Title: _Continuo Suspension Exercise_
- Composer: Vellum project fixture
- License: CC0 1.0 Universal / Public Domain Dedication
- Source: Created for Vellum's deterministic figured-bass golden path
- Files: `continuo-suspension.ly`, `continuo-suspension.pdf`, and `reviewed-score.json`

This short original exercise is dedicated to the public domain so it can be
redistributed and compiled without relying on a copyrighted edition. It models
a soprano above a complete continuo foundation in C major. The soprano F is
prepared consonantly over D in measure 1, becomes a fourth above C in measure
2, and resolves downward to E. The figures explicitly encode the `4-3`
suspension across the two halves of measure 2.

The PDF is the immutable Source Artifact used by the end-to-end fixture. The
LilyPond source and reviewed JSON are test ground truth, not alternate inputs to
the production PDF-import path.
